roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:SENTENCE/AJW/DNACOMP/CH1:SP 8 M:3/CH2:SP 8 M:3/654:2/DEF:TO RECEIVECREDIT FOR TIME SERVED OF 36 DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 36 SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 72 DAYS,/COA:40/ICNA/VF5:300/X:ANY OUTSTANDING RESTITUTION FROM COURT NO,15025314 MAY BE ADDED TO THIS SENTENCE PURSUANT TO HARVEY WAIVER, THE COURT RESERVES RESTITUTION JURISDICTION AS TO THIS CASE AND COURT NO,15025314,/X:COURT INDICATES DEFENDANT WAS PREVIOUSLY SENTENCED TO THE LOWER TERM OF 2 YEARS STATE PRISON IN LOS ANGELES COUNTY CASE NO, YA09383601 PLUS 1 YEAR FOR ANENHANCEMENT PURSUANT TO PC 12022,6(A)(1), THE SENTENCE ON COUNT 5 ISCONSECUTIVE TO THAT PRINCIPAL TERM FOR A TOTAL TERM OF 3 YEARS AND 8 MONTHSIN STATE PRISON,/PAR/CDC/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/
